items.title: Sources: Ekitike ruptures Achilles, misses WC
items.summary: Hugo Ekitike will miss the World Cup and be out for at least nine months after he ruptured his Achilles tendon on Tuesday night, a source told ESPN.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Sherrone Moore accuser Paige Shiver expresses disgust over his sentencing, ‘Does not reflect the seriousness’
items.summary: Sherrone Moore, former Michigan football coach, received 18 months probation for charges including stalking and home invasion linked to an extramarital affair.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Wiaan Mulder misses Essex's trip to Warwickshire for personal reasons
items.summary: Allrounder heads home to South Africa after two County Championship appearances
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
